---
title: "Does mode of administration impact the quality of data? Comparing a traditional survey versus an online survey via a Voting Advice Application"
author: "Triga, V., and Manavopoulos, V."
date: 2019-01-01
description: "Survey Research Methods, 13, 181–194. doi: 10.18148/srm/2019.v13i2.7392"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---
